seo.description: Mortgage options for foreign national buyers purchasing U.S. property. Specialty lender programs. NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: Foreign National Loans
hero.subheading: Specialty financing discussions for foreign national buyers of U.S. residential property.

intro.heading: Buying in the U.S. as a Foreign National
paragraphs: Searching for foreign national loans near you in New York, New Jersey, Florida, or Pennsylvania? Green Street Capital is a licensed mortgage broker that compares multiple lenders for foreign national loans and related programs — so you are not limited to one bank’s rules.
Foreign national financing typically requires larger down payments, strong reserves, and specialized lender overlays. Credit may be evaluated differently when U.S. credit history is limited.
We coordinate with lenders experienced in these files and set expectations early about documentation, timelines, and cash to close.
bullets: Non-U.S. citizens purchasing investment or second homes (program-dependent)
Buyers with limited U.S. credit history

sidebar.heading: Plan for Higher Cash Requirements
sidebar.body: Down payment and reserve expectations are often higher than for domestic primary-residence loans.

programs.description: Financing rentals subject to investor and foreign-national overlays.

programs.title: Entity Purchases

programs.title: Full Documentation Support
programs.description: Help organizing income, banking, and identification documents.

faqs.question: Do I need a U.S. credit score?
faqs.answer: Not always. Some programs use alternative credit or foreign credit references. Requirements vary widely.

faqs.question: Are foreign national loans available in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes. Green Street Capital helps eligible borrowers explore foreign national loans in New York (including NYC and surrounding areas) as a licensed mortgage broker. NMLS #2066586.

faqs.question: Can I get foreign national loans in New Jersey or Florida?
faqs.answer: Often yes where licensed and program guidelines allow. We serve NY, NJ, FL, and PA — ask about foreign national loans for your state.

faqs.question: How do I apply for foreign national loans?
faqs.answer: Schedule a free consultation or choose a loan officer on our Team page. We will review income, credit, property, and program fit.

faqs.question: What credit score do I need for foreign national loans?
faqs.answer: Requirements vary by lender and program. We review your full profile — credit is only one factor alongside income, reserves, and property type.

cta.heading: Explore foreign national options
cta.body: Speak with our team before you go under contract so financing is realistic.
